purpose: Brief overview of the .claude/ directory structure for humans browsing the codebase. Lists the four sub-areas (hooks/, agents/, skills/, settings.json) with one-line purposes, and clarifies the relationship to other Synapse directories (_commands/, agent/, CLAUDE.md). Points to MIGRATION.md for the 'why' behind the structure.
gotchas: Very high-level overview — actual hook/skill/agent contracts live in their respective files
Does not enumerate the 18 hooks or 10 skills — see directory listings for current set
patterns: Directory README pattern: table of subdirs + relationships + see-also
